---
name: Triggering issue
about: The skill fired when it shouldn't have, or didn't fire when it should
title: ''
labels: triggering
assignees: ''
---

**Direction of the problem**
- [ ] Fired when it should NOT have (false positive)
- [ ] Did NOT fire when it should have (false negative)

**What you asked**
The message you sent that did / didn't trigger the skill.

**What you expected the skill to do**

**Anything else**
If it fired on an adjacent task (interview prep, offers, own-profile editing, etc.), note which —
that helps tighten the `description` frontmatter.
